headline: Vistra Expands Residential Battery Aggregation Program with Enphase Energy
summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) today announced an expansion of its battery aggregation program to include Enphase Energy's IQ® Batteries, further scaling its residential virtual power plant (VPP) to strengthen grid reliability across Texas. The program, Battery Rewards, is offered through Vistra's flagship retail electricity brand, TXU Energy, and allows eligible Enphase customers to earn incentives by exporting stored battery power to the grid during periods of high demand.
